phrases.intent_en: What are the opening hours of the cryptoporticus?
phrases.text_local: Quels sont les horaires d'ouverture du cryptoportique ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel sohn lay zoh-RAIR doo-vair-TOOR doo kreep-toh-por-TEEK
phrases.cultural_note: The cryptoporticus is a Gallo-Roman archaeological site with limited visiting hours.

responses.english: The opening hours are posted at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: lay zoh-RAIR sohn tah-fee-SHAY ah lahn-TRAY
responses.french: Les horaires sont affichés à l'entrée.

phrases.intent_en: Can we go down to visit the galleries?
phrases.text_local: On peut descendre visiter les galeries ?
phrases.pronunciation: on puh day-SOND-ruh vee-zee-TAY lay gah-luh-REE
phrases.cultural_note: Yes — the underground galleries are accessible and free to enter. Entrance is beneath the Place du Forum in the city centre.

responses.english: Yes, the way down is over here.
responses.phonetic: wee lah day-SAHNT eh par ee-SEE
responses.french: Oui, la descente est par ici.

phrases.cultural_note: The Cryptoportique is a network of underground Roman galleries beneath the forum of Durocortorum — ancient Reims — dating from the 1st century BC.

responses.english: It's a network of underground Roman galleries.
responses.phonetic: say tuhn ray-ZOH duh gah-luh-REE soo-tuh-REN roh-MEN.
responses.french: C'est un réseau de galeries souterraines romaines.

phrases.text_local: Où se trouve l'entrée du Cryptoportique ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lahn-TRAY doo kreep-toh-por-TEEK

responses.english: Under the Palais du Tau, opposite the cathedral.
responses.phonetic: soo luh pah-LAY doo TOH, ahn fahs duh lah kah-tay-DRAL.
responses.french: Sous le Palais du Tau, en face de la cathédrale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long a visit takes
phrases.text_local: Combien de temps dure la visite ?
phrases.pronunciation: kom-BYAN duh TAHN door lah vee-ZEET

responses.english: About thirty minutes for the full circuit.
responses.phonetic: ahn-vee-RON TRAHNT mee-NOOT poor luh TOOR com-PLAY.
responses.french: Environ trente minutes pour le tour complet.
